methods.name: IDC
methods.note: Iterative dual correspondence 2D odometry (Lu & Milios 1997, simplified port).

methods.name: MbICP
methods.note: Metric-based ICP 2D odometry with rolling local map (Minguez-Lamiraux-Montesano ICRA 2005, simplified port).

methods.name: NDT-2D
methods.note: 2D NDT scan matching odometry (Biber & Straßer IROS 2003, simplified port).

methods.name: PSM
methods.note: Polar scan matching 2D odometry (Hähnel polar range correlation, simplified port).

methods.name: Kinematic-ICP
methods.note: Unicycle PL-ICP + wheel odom prior (Guadagnino ICRA 2025, simplified 2D port). GT-derived wheel odometry.

methods.name: CSM
methods.note: Correlative scan matching 2D odometry (Olson ICRA 2009, simplified port).

methods.name: PL-ICP
methods.note: Point-to-line ICP 2D scan odometry (Censi IROS 2008, simplified port).

methods.name: RF2O
methods.note: Range-flow 2D laser odometry (Jaimez ICRA 2016, simplified port).
